parameters.name: fitness_profile
parameters.description: Manage the user's fitness profile. sub_action='setup' creates a profile and auto-computes daily kcal and macros via Mifflin-St-Jeor; 'update' modifies existing fields; 'get' returns the current profile. Pass sex (m/f), birthdate (YYYY-MM-DD), height_cm, weight_kg_baseline, activity_level (sedentary/light/moderate/active/very_active), goal (lose_weight/maintain/gain_muscle/recomp/endurance), target_weight_kg, target_date (YYYY-MM-DD), allergies (csv), dietary_restrictions (csv), training_days_per_week, daily_kcal_override (manual override).

value.training_days_per_week: ={{ $fromAI('training_days_per_week', "How many days per week the user trains", 'string') }}

parameters.name: log_meal
parameters.description: Log a meal. sub_action='from_text' parses a description (e.g. '100g oatmeal, 200ml milk, 1 banana'); 'from_voice' is identical (text from voice transcript); 'from_photo' uses the photo file_ref to call OpenAI vision and estimate items+grams; 'from_barcode' looks up by EAN; 'from_memory' logs a saved meal_memory_id; 'edit' modifies notes/meal_type of meal_id; 'delete' removes meal_id; 'clear_day' wipes all meals for a date (requires confirm=true). Always include meal_type (breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack).

value.sub_action: ={{ $fromAI('sub_action', "from_text, from_voice, from_photo, from_barcode, from_memory, edit, delete, or clear_day", 'string') }}
value.file_ref: ={{ $fromAI('file_ref', "Photo file_ref from the user's message (for from_photo)", 'string') }}

parameters.name: meal_memory
parameters.description: Manage frequently eaten meals. sub_action='list' shows top-20 saved meals with usage count; 'save' stores a previously logged meal_id under a name (e.g. 'My standard breakfast'); 'delete' removes meal_memory_id.

value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', "Display name for the saved meal (for save)", 'string') }}

parameters.name: suggest_meal
parameters.description: Suggest 3 next-meal options that fit the remaining macro budget for today. Respects allergies, dietary restrictions, and prefers user favorites from meal_memory.

parameters.name: log_workout
parameters.description: Log a workout. sub_action='log' (default) saves a new workout, auto-extracting exercise_type/duration_min/intensity from text/voice if provided. 'edit' updates workout_id; 'delete' removes workout_id. Pass text (e.g. '30 min jog medium intensity') OR explicit fields (exercise_type, duration_min, intensity).

parameters.name: log_body
parameters.description: Log body measurements (weight, body fat %, circumferences) and view trends. sub_action='log' saves a measurement; 'list' shows entries from last N days; 'trend' computes change between first and last entry over the window.

parameters.name: log_hydration
parameters.description: Log water intake and check progress. sub_action='log' adds volume_ml; 'today' shows progress vs target; 'set_target' updates daily target_ml in the profile.

parameters.name: goals
parameters.description: Manage fitness goals. sub_action='set' creates a goal (goal_type: weight, body_fat, workout_frequency, distance, strength, habit, streak); 'list' shows active goals with progress; 'archive' marks goal_id done.

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: Aggregated fitness report. sub_action='today' shows today's calories vs target, macros, workouts, water, and active streak; 'week' or 'month' aggregate the period.

parameters.name: training_plan
parameters.description: Manage multi-week training plans. sub_action='generate_custom' uses LLM + wger.de exercise database to create a periodized plan tailored to profile and goal (params: goal, weeks, days_per_week, equipment); 'import_template' clones a wger public template (param: template_id); 'list_templates' shows wger templates; 'today' returns today's planned session; 'get_active' returns active plan summary; 'complete_session' marks session_id complete; 'adjust' notes adjustment (V2 will restructure).

value.sub_action: ={{ $fromAI('sub_action', "generate_custom, import_template, list_templates, today, get_active, complete_session, or adjust", 'string') }}

parameters.name: reminders
parameters.description: Set up recurring fitness reminders fired by the heartbeat. sub_action='setup' adds presets (preset='morning_meal' / 'evening_summary' / 'weekly_report' / 'all'); 'list' shows configured reminders; 'disable' turns off reminder_id.

parameters.name: insights
parameters.description: Pattern detection over the last 30 days of logs. sub_action='analyze' runs LLM analysis on aggregated stats and writes 3-5 insights to memory_long (category=insight, entity_name=fitness) for the agent to recall in future turns; 'list' shows the latest insights.

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Export logs as CSV. type='meals' / 'workouts' / 'body' / 'hydration'. since/until are YYYY-MM-DD (default last 30 days). The CSV is uploaded to the file bridge and a file_ref is returned for the agent to send as a Telegram document.

parameters.name: nutrition_lookup
parameters.description: Stand-alone OpenFoodFacts nutrition lookup without logging. sub_action='by_name' searches by product name (top N results); 'by_barcode' fetches a product by EAN.
